summary: Guardian landing page with ChatGPT-like experience testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features verified. The new landing page shows hero section, input field, quick action buttons, and session list. Users can start new chats, resume sessions, and delete sessions. Cross-chat knowledge is enabled via backend aggregation.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML nesting error: <button> (delete) is nested inside <button> (session). This causes 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' console error. Should use <div> with role='button' for outer container or restructure.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /admin' - cosmetic issue from sidebar navigation

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/chat/sessions returns list of sessions with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/chat/sessions limits to max 20 results
Backend: POST /api/chat/guardian creates new session and returns AI response
Backend: GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} returns messages for valid session
Backend: GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} returns empty list for nonexistent session
Backend: DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{session_id} removes session
Backend: DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{session_id} returns 404 for nonexistent session
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Guardian landing page loads with hero section (Estate Guardian title)
Frontend: Landing input field (data-testid='landing-input') present and functional
Frontend: Landing send button (data-testid='landing-send-button') works
Frontend: Analyze Vault quick action button clickable and starts chat
Frontend: Generate Checklist quick action button visible
Frontend: Readiness Score quick action button visible
Frontend: New Chat button on landing creates fresh conversation
Frontend: Recent Conversations list shows sessions with titles and timestamps
Frontend: Clicking session resumes it and loads conversation history
Frontend: Back arrow button returns to landing page
Frontend: New Chat button in chat header starts fresh conversation
Frontend: Chat input and send button work in active chat
Frontend: Actions popover opens after conversation starts
Frontend: Questions popover opens after conversation starts
Frontend: Mobile responsive layout works - all elements visible and properly wrapped
Frontend: Mobile bottom nav present
action_items: LOW: Fix HTML nesting issue - delete button inside session button. Recommend using <div role='button'> for session container to avoid nested buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: GuardianPage.js uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Cross-chat knowledge feature properly implemented via MongoDB aggregation in guardian.py (lines 329-372)
Session title extraction from first user message is correct
Time ago helper function properly formats timestamps
Backend properly handles session creation, history retrieval, and deletion
seed_data_creation: Created test sessions during testing (prefix: test_session_, test_delete_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian landing page with ChatGPT-like UI fully tested. All session management features working: list sessions (max 20), create via chat, resume by clicking, delete via API and hover button. Backend endpoints: GET /api/chat/sessions, DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{session_id}, GET /api/chat/history/{session_id}, POST /api/chat/guardian. Cross-chat knowledge enabled - AI has context from recent sessions. Minor HTML nesting issue with delete button inside session button (console error but functional). App URL: https://guardian-persist.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: admin@carryon.com / admin123.

features: Create new session via landing input
Create new session via New Chat button
Resume session by clicking in list
Back button returns to landing and refreshes list

endpoints: GET /api/chat/sessions - Returns max 20 sessions with session_id, title, last_message_at, message_count
DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{session_id} - Deletes session, returns 404 if not found
GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} - Returns messages with role, content
POST /api/chat/guardian - Creates/continues session with AI response

cross_chat_knowledge.note: Backend aggregates last 40 messages from up to 5 recent sessions and adds as system context
